query:
SELECT 
  section,
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  SUM(CAST(payment_tx_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_tx_amount,
  SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_total_amount,
  MAX(populated_at) AS latest
FROM debt_collected_cache 
GROUP BY section;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT 
  section,
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  SUM(CAST(payment_tx_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_tx_amount,
  SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS sum_total_amount,
  MAX(populated_at) AS latest
FROM debt_collected_cache 
GROUP BY section;
